pr.title: Show and sort by remaining code bytes in Wiki TU page
pr.author: ribbanya

summary: Updated the Wiki translation-unit tooling page generator to compute remaining .text/code bytes per unit, show a Remaining column in the full table, and sort in-progress and data-left unit lists by remaining code bytes.

key_files.role: Wiki TU page generator; changed to compute integer measure values through a helper, add remaining_code to each unit, display it in full rows, and sort selected lists by it.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: tools/wiki_tu.py added 22 deleted 9 hunks 4
raw_diff: additions of get_measure_int, remaining_code calculation, Remaining header, and sort key by_remaining

what_changed.text: Added get_measure_int(unit, key) to normalize missing measure values to integer 0 and reused it for matched_code, total_code, matched_data, and total_data reads.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: get_measure_int added near assignee_cells; percent_cells and row_full changed from inline int(measures.get(... ) or 0) to get_measure_int

what_changed.text: Computed unit['measures']['remaining_code'] as total_code - matched_code while iterating over units before list classification.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: loop over data['units'] adds matched_code, total_code, and remaining_code assignment

what_changed.text: Added a Remaining column to the full Wiki table output and emits a friendly_size value, or '—' when remaining_code is zero.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: row_full adds remaining_code/remaining and returns link|matched|total|remaining|...; full_header gains Remaining and one separator column

what_changed.text: Sorted in_progress and data_left lists by remaining_code using a by_remaining key function.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: by_remaining function and in_progress.sort/data_left.sort additions

smart_moves.text: Centralized repeated measure-to-int conversion in get_measure_int before adding another derived metric, reducing duplicated parsing expressions in percent and row rendering code.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: repeated int(measures.get(... ) or 0) calls replaced with get_measure_int

smart_moves.text: Stored remaining_code in unit['measures'] so display and sort code use the same derived metric.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: unit['measures']['remaining_code'] assignment and by_remaining reads via get_measure_int(unit, 'remaining_code')

decomp_lessons.lesson: Progress dashboards for decompilation can be more actionable when they expose remaining code bytes, not only matched and total counts or percentages.
evidence_refs: PR title: Show and sort by remaining code bytes in Wiki TU page
raw_diff: Remaining column added and in_progress/data_left sorted by remaining_code

naming_conventions.name: remaining_code
naming_conventions.convention: Derived measure key for total_code - matched_code in Wiki TU unit measures.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: unit['measures']['remaining_code'] = total_code - matched_code

naming_conventions.name: get_measure_int
naming_conventions.convention: Helper name used for retrieving integer-valued entries from unit['measures'] with missing values defaulted to 0.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: def get_measure_int(unit, key: str) -> int: return int(unit['measures'].get(key) or 0)

naming_conventions.name: by_remaining
naming_conventions.convention: Sort-key helper name for ordering units by remaining_code.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: def by_remaining(unit): return get_measure_int(unit, 'remaining_code')

follow_up_queries: Wiki TU Remaining column matched total remaining

accepted_candidate_records.title: Wiki TU progress pages can sort by remaining code bytes
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2649 updated tools/wiki_tu.py to compute remaining_code as total_code - matched_code, display a Remaining column, and sort in-progress/data-left units by that value, making remaining code bytes a first-class progress metric.
evidence_refs: PR title: Show and sort by remaining code bytes in Wiki TU page
raw_diff: remaining_code assignment, Remaining table header, and by_remaining sort
